rows.label: xs32302100_MSG0040
rows.name: Just as expected from Elma's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32302100_MSG0050
rows.name: Kurogane no Tairiku is the final one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32302100_MSG0070
rows.name:
Once we've finished gathering it,
we'll return to Yakou no Mori.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32302100_MSG0080
rows.name:
Understood, I will return
as well once I'm done.[ST:wait ]
